Command.Name: project
Command.Description: Manages projects in Lino CLI.

Command.Name: new
Command.Description: Starts a new .NET project with a full structure.

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists projects already created with Lino.

Command.Name: service
Command.Description: Manages services within the project.

Command.Name: new
Command.Description: Creates a new service — simple or modularized.

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists services already created in the project.

Command.Name: module
Command.Description: Manages modules in modularized services.

Command.Name: new
Command.Description: Creates a new module within a modularized service.

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists existing modules in the current service.

Command.Name: entity
Command.Description: Manages entities within the service or module.

Command.Name: new
Command.Description: Creates a new domain entity.

Command.Name: edit
Command.Description: Edits properties or settings of an existing entity.

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists all entities in a service or module.

Command.Name: enumeration
Command.Description: Manages enumerations.

Command.Name: new
Command.Description: Creates an enumeration in the domain layer.

Command.Name: edit
Command.Description: Edits an existing enumeration.

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists enumerations available in the service or module.

Command.Name: value-object
Command.Description: Manages value objects.

Command.Name: new
Command.Description: Creates a value object in the domain.

Command.Name: edit
Command.Description: Edits an existing value object.

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists value objects related to the current context.

Command.Name: query
Command.Description: Manages queries.

Command.Name: new
Command.Description: Creates a new query in the application layer.

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists queries defined for an entity.

Command.Name: command
Command.Description: Manages commands.

Command.Name: new
Command.Description: Creates a new command in the application layer.

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists commands associated with an entity.

Command.Name: api
Command.Description: Manages APIs.

Command.Name: new
Command.Description: Creates a new API within the selected service or module.

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists all APIs linked to the current entity or context.

Command.Name: web-app
Command.Description: Manages web applications.

Command.Name: new
Command.Description: Adds a web application to the project.

Command.Name: page
Command.Description: Manages web pages.

Command.Name: new
Command.Description: Generates a new page within the project.

Command.Name: edit
Command.Description: Edits properties or settings of an existing page.

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists pages linked to an entity.

Command.Name: event
Command.Description: Manages events.

Command.Name: new
Command.Description: Creates a domain or integration event.

Command.Name: edit
Command.Description: Edits a domain or integration event.

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists events associated with the entity.

Command.Name: event-handler
Command.Description: Manages event handlers.

Command.Name: new
Command.Description: Creates a new event handler.

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists all handlers linked to events in the current context.

Command.Name: feature
Command.Description: Manages global project features.

Command.Name: background-job
Command.Description: Manages support for background task processing.

Command.Name: add
Command.Description: Adds support for background task processing.

Command.Name: auth
Command.Description: Manages authentication and authorization settings.

Command.Name: add
Command.Description: Adds full authentication and authorization support to the project.

Command.Name: database
Command.Description: Manages the full lifecycle of database migrations.

Command.Name: new
Command.Description: Generates a new database migration.

Command.Name: apply
Command.Description: Applies pending migrations in the specified service or module.

Command.Name: revert
Command.Description: Reverts the last applied migration.

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists migrations that have been applied or are pending in the selected context.

Command.Name: version
Command.Description: Manages service versions.

Command.Name: show
Command.Description: Shows the current version of a specific service.

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: Lists the current versions of all services and web applications.

Command.Name: bump
Command.Description: Increments the version of a service or web application following semantic versioning (SemVer).

Command.Name: build
Command.Description: Builds the defined services and web applications and generates their Docker images.

Command.Name: user
Command.Description: Manages users in the tool.

Command.Name: register
Command.Description: Registers a new user via CLI.

Command.Name: auth
Command.Description: Manages user authentication features.

Command.Name: login
Command.Description: Logs the user into the Lino CLI.

Command.Name: logout
Command.Description: Logs the user out of the tool.

Command.Name: preferences
Command.Description: Manages the user’s global preferences in the CLI.

Command.Name: culture
Command.Description: Manages the CLI’s default language/culture.

Command.Name: set
Command.Description: Changes the current language/culture used by the tool.

Option.Description: en | pt | es | de | fr | it | ja | ko | ru | zh
